name: beten-homes-rent
description: Beten Homes Rent - Smart Property Rental System

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@beten-homes-rent/shared && npm run build --workspace=@beten-homes-rent/backend && npm run build --workspace=@beten-homes-rent/frontend
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:mobile
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace=@beten-homes-rent/shared && npm run clean --workspace=@beten-homes-rent/backend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:shared && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.postinstall: echo Workspace install complete. Run 'npm run build:shared' to build shared package.
